resume.raw_text:
=== Iyana Rankin - Resume.pdf ===
Iyana Rankin 

Determined individual with a proven track record in stock and brand 
management, poised to leverage this expertise into a progressive role. 
Committed to delivering exceptional results and contributing effectively to 
organizational growth. 

68 Fallon Dr 
Hamden, CT 06514 
(347) 545-6409 
iyanarankin05@gmail.com 

EXPERIENCE 

SKILLS 

Madrag, North Haven,CT— Team Lead 

 June 2024 - Present 

As a team lead, my responsibilities include Opening and/or closing the store, 

opening and closing registers, counting the safe as well as making deposits 

Highly organized 

  Great communication 

  Time and task management 

as a part of closing procedures. As team lead I also handle projects such as 

  Basic Computer Skills 

reworking the visual walls and dressing the mannequins as well as 

re-organizing areas of the store. Essentially I act as a manager when the 

manager is not present. 

Amazon, Danbury,CT — Warehouse Associate  

October 2023 - February 2024 

As an Amazon Stock Associate, my primary responsibilities typically 

  Responsible 

  Team Player 

  Sensitive to Needs 

  Problem Solving 

  G suite 

include Receiving and inspecting incoming shipments of goods.Organizing 

  Microsoft/Zoom 

and storing inventory in designated locations within the warehouse. And 

picking and packing items for customer orders, ensuring accuracy and 

efﬁciency. 

Primark, Brooklyn,NY — Overnight Replenishment Associate  

May 2023 - October 2023 

As a Replenishment Associate at Primark, my key duties typically include 
replenishing merchandise on the sales ﬂoor to maintain attractive and fully 
stocked displays. Monitoring inventory levels and identifying areas 
requiring restocking to meet customer demand.Efﬁciently unpacking and 
sorting incoming deliveries of merchandise.And ensuring accurate pricing 
and labeling of products before placing them on the sales ﬂoor. 

Alpine Scout Camp, Alpine,NJ — Counselor  

June 2020 - August 2020 

While working as a counselor my duties included Supporting operations 
within the Arts and Theater Department by preparing necessary supplies 
and materials for camp activities. Provided guidance and instruction to 
campers, explaining project requirements,and assisting them with their 
creative endeavors. Ensured a positive and engaging experience for campers 
by offering support and encouragement throughout the artistic process. 

  EDUCATION 

  Cypress Hills Collegiate 

Preparatory High School, 

Brooklyn,Ny — High School 

Diploma 

  September 2018 - August 2021 

  Graduated early with high 

honors. 

 
 
   
   
 Building Beats, Brooklyn,Ny — Youth Intern 

June 2019 - August 2019 

During my internship at the Summer Youth Employment Program, I 
actively collaborated with working professionals and fellow interns to 
develop a diverse skill set. This experience enabled me to enhance my 
abilities in personal branding, problem-solving, effective communication, 
and email etiquette. 

Speakhire, Brooklyn,Ny — Intern 

November 2020- April 2021 

During my internship, I enhanced proﬁciency in social media management 
and marketing strategies through practical application.Contributed to 
recording and reﬁning sounds, demonstrating a commitment to audio 
production and development. Strengthened communication abilities by 
presenting end-of-summer projects encompassing sampling, tempo, beat, 
and album cover design.

Madrag, North Haven,CT— Team Lead 

 June 2024 - Present 

As a team lead, my responsibilities include Opening and/or closing the store, 
opening and closing registers, counting the safe as well as making deposits 
as a part of closing procedures. As team lead I also handle projects such as 
reworking the visual walls and dressing the mannequins as well as 
re-organizing areas of the store. Essentially I act as a manager when the 
manager is not present.

October 2023 - February 2024 

As an Amazon Stock Associate, my primary responsibilities typically 
include Receiving and inspecting incoming shipments of goods.Organizing 
and storing inventory in designated locations within the warehouse. And 
picking and packing items for customer orders, ensuring accuracy and 
efﬁciency.

stocked displays. Monitoring inventory levels and identifying areas 
requiring restocking to meet customer demand.Efﬁciently unpacking and 
sorting incoming deliveries of merchandise.And ensuring accurate pricing 
and labeling of products before placing them on the sales ﬂoor.
